task_description: Complete rebuild of the Klondike Solitaire game to premium studio quality with neomorphism UI, comprehensive features (unlimited undo/redo, hints, multiple difficulties, scoring modes, achievements, daily challenges, particle effects, ambient music), fully responsive design, platform adapters, PWA support, and comprehensive tests.

verification.summary: All 3 test suites pass (277+280+198=755 total). Build generates 5 platform zips with 37 files each. Two review passes completed - all 9 issues found and fixed.
